name: cuenca-validations
documentation:
# Cuenca - validations

[![test](https://github.com/cuenca-mx/cuenca-validations/workflows/test/badge.svg)](https://github.com/cuenca-mx/cuenca-validations/actions?query=workflow%3Atest)
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/cuenca-mx/cuenca-validations/branch/master/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/cuenca-mx/cuenca-validations)
[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/cuenca-validations.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/cuenca-validations/)

Shared validations library across multiple Cuenca projects

classes.name: cuenca_validations.errors.CuencaError
documentation: Exceptions related to ApiKeys, Login, Password, etc

classes.name: cuenca_validations.errors.MissingAuthorizationHeaderError
documentation: Neither Basic Auth or JWT found

classes.name: cuenca_validations.errors.NoPasswordFoundError
documentation: User must create a password before to continue

classes.name: cuenca_validations.errors.AuthMethodNotAllowedError
documentation: No permissions to use this authentication method

classes.name: cuenca_validations.errors.TooManyAttemptsError
documentation: This user has tried too many times to activate a card

classes.name: cuenca_validations.errors.UserLocationError
documentation: User not in the same location from which they logged in.

functions.name: cuenca_validations.validators.sanitize_item
documentation:
---
param default: Optional function to be used when there is no case
param item: item to be sanitized
---

for this type of item, default `None` it returns the item as is.

class_variables.name: cuenca_validations.types.queries.QueryParams.Config.extra
documentation: raise ValidationError if there are extra fields

functions.name: tests.test_types.test_invalid_class
documentation:
For a class that doesn't have a `to_dict` method and it is not a type of
`date` nor `Enum`, will use the default `json.JSONEncoder` method which
raises a `TypeError`.

classes.name: cuenca_validations.types.card.StrictPaymentCardNumber
documentation: requires that the BIN be associated to a known BIN for a Mexican bank

classes.name: cuenca_validations.types.general.StrictPositiveInt
documentation:
- strict: ensures a float isn't passed in by accident
- gt (greater than): ensures the value is strictly above 0

classes.name: cuenca_validations.types.general.StrictPositiveFloat
documentation:
- strict: ensures an integer isn't passed in by accident
- ge (greater than or equal): ensures the value is above 0

classes.name: cuenca_validations.types.enums.EcommerceIndicator
documentation:
Adquirente graba
Emisor lee
0, “ “ = No es una transacción de comercio electrónico
1 = Transacción MOTO
2 = MOTO Indicator – Recurring Transaction
3 = MOTO Indicator – Installment Payment
4 = MOTO Indicator – Deferred Transaction
5 = Comercio seguro, titular autenticado (3D Secure)
6 = Comercio seguro, titular no autenticado (3D Secure)
7 = Autenticación 3D Secure no realizada
8 – La transacción no incluye el uso de ningún cifrado de transacción
    como SSL, no se realiza autenticación.
